title: oh-my-space oms.yaml
description: Declarative list of external source repositories for the oms CLI. Each entry becomes a git submodule under oms/<alias>/.

alias.description: Unique identifier; becomes the directory name under oms/.

remotes.description: Named git remotes; must include "origin". Each value is a clonable git URL (ssh, https, or file://). origin becomes the submodule's primary remote; others are added on sync.

branch.description: Baseline branch to check out in the submodule. Omit to use the remote's default branch.
